title: Alone Mod [The Found Footage]
description: I just make Mod Found Footage perfect and play with friends.
body:
I tried to make the modpack look good and playable with friends. There are some minor UI and settings tweaks.

**How to play**
[To enter the Backroom world](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1042137437750693971/1358589030840926352/Untitled_video_-_Made_with_Clipchamp.gif?ex=67f46422&is=67f312a2&hm=3151cb200994f4c1feb4f47573f94881cf48120c83bd27998aaa998690629aa9&=), once you create a world, you have to find a way to get buried, such as dropping blocks, sand, or gravel on yourself. Then you will be sent to the Backroom immediately.


**Not recommended**
You should not find items or food before entering the Backroom because once you enter, all your items will be gone.


**Basic Controls**
- Shift        - Run
- Ctrl         - Sneak
- F            - flashlight
- Middle mouse - Ping
- C            - Zoom
- B            - Set up Voice Chat
